title: Silly Willy Modpack
description: This is an expansive and all around modpack for servers that includes great mods at great fps
body:
![A image in a Minecraft like font reading "Silly Willy Modpack"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9568a4a431b042f89d05d0f0566f77053ae37e57_0.webp)
# Have you ever wondered why minecraft seems boring?
### Fear no more!
For the Silly Willy Modpack is here to solve that!
# What does this bring to the table?
This modpack brings mods like Create, Mekanism, and Farmer's Delight all together for a super mass of differing levels of difficulty 
# MAGIC?
![A player is casting Ars Nouveau magic ontop of a mage tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c9734f17bcd59a6bf1bc0be22222ddfce00d9c3.png)
Yes, this modpack has a bunch of different magic mods and is designed to be more accessible to everyone with some easier mod and some harder ones
# SPACE?!
![A player is on the planet "Glacio" from Ad Astra and is looking at the purple moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07686ac1f601c87026cc8ef55f4564c3f75fdb1_0.webp)
This modpack also has the wondrous Ad Astra mod that adds new planets to explore and potentially conquer these planet either alone or along side your friends
## This modpack also includes
- Silly Wily Core 
> A mod that holds things like
> -  All new Triangulum ore used to make Triangulum based tools
> - Entangulum Ore, Used to make the (not currently available) comfy bed 

- Bamboo'd
>   A Bamboo centered mod currently containing Spears

> This has been worked on by Crit(Programmer), Zomagon(Artist and concepts), and P.(Programmer and ideas)
